abstracts.abstract: By Representative Fluker-Reid of Boston, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 3927) of Brandy Fluker-Reid (with the approval of the mayor and city council) that the city of Boston be authorized to appoint Jean E. Roseney a police officer notwithstanding the maximum age requirement.  Public Service.  [Local Approval Received.]

bill.title: An Act directing the city of Boston Police Department to waive the maximum age requirement for police officers for Jean E. Roseney

action.description: Taken out of the Orders of the Day
